rulings.Case Title: ARKETHA MUNIR VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 06, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANTS CTC REAL ESTATE SERVICES, RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend (1) Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 4th and 6th causes of action. No opposition. (2) Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 1st and 2nd causes of action. Plaintiff does not have standing. (3) Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 5th cause of action. The purported breach by the moving defendants is the failure to "inform Plaintiff her loan was sold, thus depraving Plaintiff of the opportunity to negotiate with the true creditor" (Opposition 12:19-21). Assuming the contracts relied upon in the 5th cause of action are the Note and the DOT, it is expressly provided in paragraph 20 of DOT that "The Note or a partial interest in the Note (together with this Security Instrument) may be sold one or more times without prior notice to Borrower." Additionally, Plaintiff does not allege and does not propose to allege that Plaintiff did not know who was the servicer of the Note/purported beneficiary for the purposes of negotiations. (4) Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the third cause of action. Plaintiff fails to allege foreclosure by the moving defendants or any actual controversy between Plaintiff and moving defendants. = (501/REQ)
